sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) the redemption of a field and farm, Lev 25:24 Rth 4:6 hence-(a) the right of redemption, more fully מִשְׁפַּט הַגְּאֻלָּה Jer 32:7, comp. Jer 32:8 (see בְּכֹורָה ); Lev 25:29, 31 Lev 25:31, 48 Lev 25:48 גְּאֻלַּת עֹולָם the right of redeeming for ever, Lev 25:32.-(b) followed by a gen. a field to be redeemed by any one by right of relationship, Rth 4:6.-(c) price of redemption, Lev 25:26, 51 Lev 25:51, 52 Lev 25:52.

(2) relationship, kindredship (see root I, 3). Eze 11:15, אַנְשֵׁי גְאֻלָּתֶךָ thy kindred.
